title: Fat Loss Nutrition Guide (Sample)
content: A practical fat-loss phase should target a moderate calorie deficit of about 300 to 500 kcal per day. Keep protein intake high, roughly 1.6 to 2.2 grams per kilogram body weight per day, to preserve lean mass.

title: Strength Training Guide (Sample)
content: Strength gains require progressive overload with consistent tracking. Increase load, repetitions, or total sets gradually while maintaining technical quality and adequate recovery between hard sessions.

title: Recovery and Injury Prevention Guide (Sample)
content: Use a specific warm-up before compound lifts and avoid abrupt weekly load spikes. If joint pain persists or worsens, reduce training stress and seek evaluation from a qualified professional.
